prompt: Fill in the blank: 'She ___ a teacher.' (to be)
correctAnswer: Hon är lärare.
hints: Use the correct form of 'to be' for she.

prompt: Say: They are my friends.
correctAnswer: De är mina vänner.
hints: Practice this phrase out loud.

prompt: Fill in the blank: 'I ___ like coffee.' (not)
correctAnswer: Jag gillar inte kaffe.
hints: For present simple negative, use 'do not'.

prompt: Fill in the blank: 'We ___ students.' (to be)
correctAnswer: Vi är studenter.
hints: 'We' uses 'are'.

prompt: Choose the correct form: 'He ___ English every day.' (study)
correctAnswer: Han studerar engelska varje dag.
hints: Third person singular adds -s or -es to the verb.

prompt: Say: There is a book on the table.
correctAnswer: Det finns en bok på bordet.
hints: Use 'there is' for one thing, 'there are' for more than one.

prompt: Fill in the blank: '___ you like tea?' (to do)
correctAnswer: Gillar du te?
hints: Yes/no questions in present simple use 'do'.

prompt: Choose the article: 'She has ___ umbrella.' (a/an)
correctAnswer: Hon har ett paraply.
hints: Use 'an' before a vowel sound.

prompt: Say: I am not tired.
correctAnswer: Jag är inte trött.
hints: Negative of 'to be': add 'not'.

prompt: Fill in the blank: 'The cats ___ sleeping.' (to be)
correctAnswer: Katterna sover.
hints: Plural subject uses 'are' in the present continuous.

prompt: Say: She goes to school every day.
correctAnswer: Hon går till skolan varje dag.
hints: Notice the -s in third person singular.

prompt: Say: They are happy.
correctAnswer: De är lyckliga.
hints: Use 'are' with 'they'.

prompt: Ask: Is this sentence correct?
correctAnswer: Är denna dom korrekt?
hints: Grammar-check question.

prompt: Say: I went to the supermarket yesterday.
correctAnswer: Jag gick till stormarknaden igår.
hints: 'Went' is the irregular past tense of 'go'.

prompt: Fill in the blank: 'She ___ been waiting for an hour.' (have/has)
correctAnswer: Hon har väntat en timme.
hints: Third person singular uses 'has' in perfect tenses.

prompt: Say: If it rains, we will stay inside.
correctAnswer: Om det regnar kommer vi att stanna inom oss.
hints: First conditional: 'if' + present simple, 'will' + infinitive.

prompt: Choose the correct form: 'I ___ to the cinema last Saturday.' (go)
correctAnswer: Jag åkte till bio i lördags.
hints: Use the simple past for a completed past event.

prompt: Fill in the blank: 'He ___ working at seven this morning.' (was/were)
correctAnswer: Han arbetade på sju i morse.
hints: He/she/it uses 'was' in past continuous.

prompt: Say: We have lived here for five years.
correctAnswer: Vi har bott här i fem år.
hints: Present perfect with 'for' expresses duration up to now.

prompt: Choose the correct comparative: 'This book is ___ than the other one.' (interesting)
correctAnswer: Denna bok är mer intressant än den andra.
hints: Long adjectives use 'more' for comparatives.

prompt: Fill in the blank: '___ you been to Paris?' (have/has)
correctAnswer: Har du varit i Paris?
hints: Question form of present perfect with 'you'.

prompt: Say: She used to play the piano when she was young.
correctAnswer: Hon brukade spela piano när hon var ung.
hints: 'Used to' expresses a past habit that no longer continues.

prompt: Fill in the blank: 'You should ___ more water.' (drink)
correctAnswer: Du bör dricka mer vatten.
hints: 'Should' is followed by the base infinitive.

prompt: Say: I have lived here for two years.
correctAnswer: Jag har bott här i två år.
hints: Present perfect for duration.

prompt: Say: If it rains, we will stay home.
correctAnswer: Om det regnar kommer vi att stanna hemma.
hints: First conditional pattern.

prompt: Ask: Should I use much or many here?
correctAnswer: Ska jag använda mycket eller många här?
hints: Countability grammar prompt.

prompt: Say: If I had more time, I would learn a third language.
correctAnswer: Om jag hade mer tid skulle jag lära mig ett tredje språk.
hints: Second conditional: 'if' + past simple, 'would' + infinitive.

prompt: Fill in the blank: 'By the time she arrives, we ___ finished dinner.' (will have)
correctAnswer: När hon anländer har vi avslutat middagen.
hints: Future perfect for an action completed before a future point.

prompt: Say: Despite feeling tired, she continued working.
correctAnswer: Trots trötthet fortsatte hon att arbeta.
hints: 'Despite' is followed by a noun or gerund (-ing form).

prompt: Choose the correct passive form: 'The report ___ by the team last week.' (write)
correctAnswer: Rapporten skrevs av laget förra veckan.
hints: Passive past simple: was/were + past participle.

prompt: Say: He told me that he had already sent the email.
correctAnswer: Han berättade för mig att han redan hade skickat e-postmeddelandet.
hints: Reported speech shifts tense: 'has sent' → 'had sent'.

prompt: Fill in the blank: 'I wish I ___ more time to practice.' (had/have)
correctAnswer: Jag önskar att jag hade mer tid att träna.
hints: 'I wish' + past simple expresses a present regret.

prompt: Say: Not only did she win the race, but she also broke the record.
correctAnswer: Inte bara vann hon loppet, men hon bröt också rekordet.
hints: 'Not only... but also' requires inversion after 'not only'.

prompt: Fill in the blank: 'She is used to ___ early.' (wake)
correctAnswer: Hon används för att vakna tidigt.
hints: 'Be used to' is followed by the gerund (-ing).

prompt: Say: The meeting was cancelled owing to the poor weather conditions.
correctAnswer: Mötet avbröts på grund av dåliga väderförhållanden.
hints: 'Owing to' is a formal way of saying 'because of'.

prompt: Choose the correct relative pronoun: 'The person ___ called left no message.' (who/which)
correctAnswer: Den som ringde lämnade inget meddelande.
hints: Use 'who' for people; 'which' for things.

prompt: Say: I wish I had more time to practice.
correctAnswer: Jag önskar att jag hade mer tid att träna.
hints: Use past form after 'wish' for present unreal situations.

prompt: Say: The report that you sent was very helpful.
correctAnswer: Den rapport som du skickade var till stor hjälp.
hints: Relative clause example.

prompt: Ask: When should I use the passive voice?
correctAnswer: När ska jag använda den passiva rösten?
hints: Usage question.

prompt: Say: Had I known about the delay, I would have taken an earlier train.
correctAnswer: Hade jag vetat om förseningen hade jag tagit ett tidigare tåg.
hints: Inverted third conditional: 'Had I...' replaces 'If I had...'

prompt: Fill in the blank: 'Rarely ___ I see such attention to detail.' (have)
correctAnswer: Sällan har jag sett en sådan uppmärksamhet på detaljer.
hints: Fronted negative adverbs require subject-auxiliary inversion.

prompt: Say: The proposal, which had been drafted over several months, was ultimately rejected.
correctAnswer: Förslaget, som utarbetats under flera månader, avvisades slutligen.
hints: Non-defining relative clause in commas; past perfect passive.

prompt: Fill in the blank: 'No sooner ___ she arrived than the meeting began.' (had)
correctAnswer: Inte förr hade hon kommit än mötet började.
hints: 'No sooner' triggers inversion; 'than' follows rather than 'when'.

prompt: Say: It is high time we addressed the underlying structural issues.
correctAnswer: Det är hög tid att vi behandlar de underliggande strukturella frågorna.
hints: 'It is high time' + past subjunctive expresses urgency.

prompt: Choose the correct form: 'The data ___ analysed before any conclusions can be drawn.' (must be)
correctAnswer: Uppgifterna ska analyseras innan eventuella slutsatser kan dras.
hints: Modal passive: modal + be + past participle.

prompt: Say: Were she to apply, she would be a strong candidate for the position.
correctAnswer: Om hon skulle ansöka, skulle hon vara en stark kandidat för positionen.
hints: Inverted conditional with 'were to' for formal, hypothetical situations.

prompt: Fill in the blank: 'The more you practice, ___ you become.' (fluent)
correctAnswer: Ju mer du övar, desto mer flytande blir du.
hints: 'The more... the more...' is a comparative structure expressing proportional change.

prompt: Say: Had I known earlier, I would have prepared differently.
correctAnswer: Hade jag vetat tidigare hade jag förberett mig annorlunda.
hints: Inverted third conditional.

prompt: Say: Not only did she finish on time, but she also improved the draft.
correctAnswer: Hon avslutade inte bara i tid, men hon förbättrade också utkastet.
hints: Inversion after negative adverbials.

prompt: Ask: How does emphasis change when we front a phrase?
correctAnswer: Hur ändras betoning när vi frontar en fras?
hints: Advanced grammar awareness question.
